scripts.preinstall: node -e "if(!/pnpm/.test(process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'')){console.error('\x1b[31m❌ Use pnpm! Outros gerenciadores estão bloqueados.\x1b[0m');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build:manual: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const flags=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('lib/domain/build-flags.json','utf8'));flags.ENABLE_SENIOR_INTEGRATION=false;flags.ENABLE_SENIOR_PUNCH_BUTTON=false;flags.ENABLE_MANUAL_PUNCH=true;flags.ENABLE_META_TIMESHEET=false;flags.ACTIVE_COMPANY='manual';fs.writeFileSync('lib/domain/build-flags.json',JSON.stringify(flags,null,2));console.log('✅ Modo manual ativado!');" && wxt build
scripts.build:senior: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const flags=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('lib/domain/build-flags.json','utf8'));flags.ENABLE_SENIOR_INTEGRATION=true;flags.ENABLE_SENIOR_PUNCH_BUTTON=false;flags.ENABLE_MANUAL_PUNCH=false;flags.ENABLE_META_TIMESHEET=true;flags.ACTIVE_COMPANY='meta';fs.writeFileSync('lib/domain/build-flags.json',JSON.stringify(flags,null,2));console.log('✅ Modo Senior ativado!');" && wxt build
scripts.build:meta: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const flags=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('lib/domain/build-flags.json','utf8'));flags.ENABLE_SENIOR_INTEGRATION=true;flags.ENABLE_SENIOR_PUNCH_BUTTON=false;flags.ENABLE_MANUAL_PUNCH=false;flags.ENABLE_META_TIMESHEET=true;flags.ACTIVE_COMPANY='meta';flags.APP_NAME='Ponto Meta';flags.ENABLE_WIDGET=true;flags.ENABLE_NOTIFICATIONS=true;flags.ENABLE_YESTERDAY=false;flags.THEME='meta';fs.writeFileSync('lib/domain/build-flags.json',JSON.stringify(flags,null,2));console.log('✅ Configurações Meta aplicadas!');" && wxt build && wxt zip && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const oldPath=path.join('.output','senior-ponto-0.1.0-chrome.zip');const newPath=path.join('.output','exemplo-meta.zip');if(fs.existsSync(oldPath)){fs.renameSync(oldPath,newPath);console.log('✅ Arquivo renomeado para exemplo-meta.zip');}else{console.log('⚠️ Arquivo zip não encontrado');}"
